RevReady uses AI to diagnose dirtbike mechanical issues from photos and symptom descriptions — no forum threads, no guesswork. Now with live OBD2 sensor integration and real-time fault detection.

What it does

Everything your bike needs.

Built by a rider who got tired of diagnosing problems the same way everyone does — searching forums, calling friends, guessing.

🔍

AI Visual Inspection

Point your camera at any part of the bike. Returns a health score, findings by severity, repair cost estimates, and whether it's safe to ride.

⚡

Symptom Diagnoser

Describe what's wrong in plain English. AI ranks probable causes by likelihood with difficulty ratings, tools needed, and safe-to-ride verdict.

📋

Maintenance Tracker

Hour-based service tracking — oil changes, top end intervals, chain lube, brake fluid. Because dirtbikes run on engine hours, not miles.

📖

OEM Spec Database

Oil capacity, spark plug gap, valve clearances, chain size, torque specs, and service intervals for all major brands.

🔧

Repair Guides

Step-by-step walkthroughs with torque specs and pro tips for air filter, spark plug, chain swap, brake bleed, fork oil, and pilot jet.

🔥

Jetting Calculator

Input elevation, temperature, and humidity. Get recommended main and pilot jet sizes for your specific bike — 2-stroke and 4-stroke.

📡

Live Sensor Dashboard NEW

Connect via Bluetooth OBD2 adapter to stream live RPM, coolant temp, oil temp, throttle position, battery voltage, and engine hours.

🚨

Real-Time Fault Detection NEW

Live sensor data is decoded against Honda CRF250R diagnostic specs. Faults are flagged with DTC codes, symptoms, probable causes, and DIY fix guides.

🛒

Parts Price Comparison NEW

Every fault includes a cross-shop price comparison from Rocky Mountain ATV, Amazon, Partzilla, and BikeBandit, plus a YouTube repair tutorial link.

In action

Built for the trail,
not the boardroom.

Dark UI, monospaced type, dense information — designed to be used in the pits.

Live Hardware Integration

Real sensor data.
Real diagnosis.

Connect a Bluetooth OBD2 adapter to your bike and RevReady streams live engine data directly into the app. The sensor dashboard updates in real time — and automatically flags fault conditions the moment they appear.

Built and tested using a Mac-based OBD2 emulator that simulates a 2020 Honda CRF250R engine profile — including realistic RPM curves, thermal warm-up, and battery charging behavior.

Engine RPM
Coolant Temp
Oil Temp
Throttle Position
Battery Voltage
Engine Hours
P0217WARNING

High Coolant Temperature

Sensor: ECT · 105°C · Reduce pace and check coolant level at next stop.

🔧 DIY Fix — Any Rider
P0562CRITICAL

Low System Voltage

Sensor: Battery · 11.6V · Head back — stator or regulator/rectifier failing.

🔧 DIY — Advanced
MAINT-OILINFO

Oil Change Due (45 hrs)

Honda CRF250R interval: every 15 hours. Includes parts price comparison + YouTube guide.

🔧 DIY Fix — Any Rider
The story

Built by a rider,
for riders.

I ride dirtbikes at Carnegie SVRA and got tired of diagnosing problems the same way everyone does — search forums, text friends, guess. I wanted something that actually understood the machine.

I'm a freshman Mechanical Engineering student at Purdue University. Building RevReady required understanding failure modes, service intervals, and the physical relationships between components well enough to communicate them clearly to an AI model — and now to interpret real sensor data against manufacturer specifications.

The fault detection system uses real Honda DTC codes and CRF250R service manual thresholds. Every DIY repair guide is specific to the bike, with part numbers, torque specs, and actual step counts.

SwiftUI CoreBluetooth Claude Vision API Claude Language API Python OBD2 Emulator iOS 17
What's next

The roadmap

Core features are built and running on device. Here's where it goes next.

⚡

Real OBD2 Hardware

Connect a physical Bluetooth OBD2 adapter to a real EFI bike. The app already supports the full BLE protocol — just needs hardware to pair with.

📊

Predictive Maintenance

With continuous sensor data, shift from reactive diagnosis to predictive — flagging degradation trends before they become failures.

🔊

Engine Sound Diagnosis

Record engine audio and use AI to detect knock, valve tick, bearing wear, and exhaust leaks from sound signature analysis.

📱

App Store Launch

Full public release with expanded bike database, community fault reports, and subscription tier for advanced features.
